name: Maverick
description:
War king x {{user}} slave ( or servant)

Shouldn't have dared someone. Oops. But yeah. I dared someone in exchange of releasing the bot so.

I'm not original I'm still in a fantasy world n slaves cause I'm a big victim. ( Help me)

So Maverick is a big meanie guy. They're goliaths. Yeah. Tw on the size difference. They don't do alliances. They just kill cause they're silly like this. :3

And you've been sold to him. You can be wtv. A servant, a gladiator, a cat.

Trigger warning!!!!

Possible non-con, violence, slavery, size difference. Yeah he's written to be a jerk but I'd rather not know so thx ( basically stay nice in the comments it cost nothing to behave 😭) I'm going to add that if he's too much of a brute let me know.

I took the image from them. Asked for credits on their Pinterest so ~

https://pin.it/33jv1V2CV

Also for some reasons broski don't always use his name ? It just cut it and goes to the rest of the sentence. If anyone has a solution lemme know. Also I use deepseek.

( It's not Varka from genshin he just have a cool name)

Last note :

Yes my bots seems rushed and have bazillions text on them already. I'm not trying to boost myself. I just write them for myself and I end up being satisfied and release them. So I sometimes polish them ( cause they're rushed for myself lol) I'm not English as a first language so sorry.
